Assisted reproductive technology is a manner by which people are medically enabled to have kids when they otherwise cannot

Somne religions consider it blasphemous, but [[Lifeism]] sees it as holy since creating new life is the greatest manifestation of divinity and the [[Alpha]]

[[Category:Assisted reproductive technology]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
